name: Locale string bundles
version: Android resources / Apple .strings / GNU gettext .po / flat JSON.
spec: A family of key→translated-string formats used for app localisation. Android: res/values-<lang>/strings.xml with <string name="key">value</string> and <plurals>; apostrophes and double-quotes must be escaped (\' \"), and @/?  prefixes are special. Apple .strings: "key" = "value"; lines, UTF-8/UTF-16, /* comments */. GNU gettext .po: msgid/msgstr pairs with msgctxt and plural forms (msgid_plural, msgstr[n]) governed by a Plural-Forms header. Flat JSON: a single object of {"key": "value"}, sometimes nested. Common cross-format concerns: placeholder syntax (%1$s / %@ / {name}), plural categories (zero/one/two/few/many/other), and preserving untranslated keys.

examples.title: Android strings.xml
examples.content:
<resources>
  <string name="workout_start">Start workout</string>
  <plurals name="intervals">
    <item quantity="one">%d interval</item>
    <item quantity="other">%d intervals</item>
  </plurals>
</resources>

examples.title: gettext .po
examples.content:
msgctxt "button"
msgid "Start workout"
msgstr "Entraînement"

msgid "%d interval"
msgid_plural "%d intervals"
msgstr[0] "%d intervalle"
msgstr[1] "%d intervalles"

constraints.note: Escape ' and " as \' and \"; a leading @ or ? is treated as a resource reference.
.strings entries end with a semicolon; both key and value are double-quoted.
Plural handling is driven by the Plural-Forms header; msgstr[n] indices follow it.
Placeholder dialects differ: %1$s (Android), %@ (iOS), {name} (ICU/JSON); preserve them verbatim across conversion.

conversion_notes.note: Flatten Android <string>/<plurals> or .po entries to key→value; encode plural categories as suffixed keys (key_one/key_other).
Map keys to msgid/msgctxt; expand plural-suffixed keys into msgid_plural + msgstr[n].

glossary.definition: Category-based forms (zero/one/two/few/many/other) selected by quantity per locale rules.
A substitution token (%1$s, %@, {name}) that must survive translation unchanged.
